converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Latino Studies Program records
Cornell University. Latino Studies Program
Cornell University. Hispanic American Studies Program
53-19-2695
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1978-1993 Subject files Administrative and historical records of the Program; also subject files, and records of the Revelations/Revalcions Art Show (Novemebr 6 - December 19, 1993). Collection material in English 2248586
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
April 16, 2002
EAD encoding:
Eileen Keating, April 16, 2002
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Latino Studies Program was formerly the Hispanic American Studies Program.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Administrative and historical records of the Latino Studies Program; also subject files, and records of the Revelations/Revalcions Art Show (November 6 - December 19, 1993).
Cite As:
Latino Studies Program Records, #53-19-2695. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Hispanic Americans -- Societies, clubs, etc. Hispanic Americans -- Study and teaching. Hispanic American college students -- New York (State) -- Ithaca,
